## Summary
<!-- One paragraph explaining WHAT this PR does and WHY. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires version bump)
- [ ] Refactor / performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation only

## Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`ctest`)
- [ ] New unit/integration tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Tested under AddressSanitizer (`-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug`)
- [ ] Manually tested with `ab` or `curl` against a running instance

## Performance Impact
<!-- If touching hot paths: before/after `ab` numbers, or "N/A". -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project style (`.clang-format`)
- [ ] No new compiler warnings introduced
- [ ] `config.json` / README updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
